code_before: protected abstract TermsEnum getTermsEnum(IndexReader reader) throws IOException;
javadoc_before:
/** Construct the enumeration to be used, expanding the
   *  pattern term.  This method should only be called if
   *  the field exists (ie, implementations can assume the
   *  field does exist).  This method should not return null
   *  (should instead return {@link TermsEnum#EMPTY} if no
   *  terms match).  The TermsEnum must already be
   *  positioned to the first matching term. */
javadoc_after: /** Convenience method, if no attributes are needed: * This simply passes empty attributes and is equal to: * getTermsEnum(reader, new AttributeSource()) */
